LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING WHICH WAS NOT CONTESTED. DEFENDANTS COMMUNITY CHOICE FINANCIAL, INC., CALIFORNIA CHECK CASHING STORES, LLC & CHECKSMART FINANCIAL, LLC'S SPECIAL DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. THE OBJECTION RAISED TO THE COMPLAINT WAS BASED ON CCP 430.10(F) [SPECIAL DEMURRER FOR UNCERTAINTY]. UNDER THE ECONOMIC LITIGATION RULES, SUCH DEMURRERS ARE IMPROPER IN LIMITED JURISDICTION CASES. SEE CCP 92(C). THE COURT SIGNED THE PROPOSED ORDER THAT WAS EMAILED TO THE COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-08-2013 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-27-2013 Continued To May-22-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-20-2013 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
G. Thomas Martin III, Esq. of Price Law Group, Tel. 818.995.4540, for plaintiff and opposing party via Court Call;
No other appearance.

RULING: The court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANTs COMMUNITY CHOICE FINANCIAL, INC., CALIFORNIA CHECK CASHING STORES, LLC & CHECKSMART FINANCIAL, LLC's SPECIAL DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is overruled. The objection raised to the complaint was based on CCP 430.10(f) [special demurrer for uncertainty]. Under the economic litigation rules, such demurrers are improper in limited jurisdiction cases. See CCP 92(c). The Court signed the proposed order that was emailed to the court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-20-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
G. Thomas Martin III, Esq. of Price Law Group, Tel. 818.995.4540, for plaintiff via Court Call;
No other appearance.

RULING: The court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANTs COMMUNITY CHOICE FINANCIAL, INC., CALIFORNIA CHECK CASHING STORES, LLC & CHECKSMART FINANCIAL, LLC's unopposed MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF PLAINTIFF'S 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is granted with 20 days leave to amend to plead more facts to support the prayers for relief. The Court signed the proposed order that was emailed to the court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-23-2013 Continued To Apr-10-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
